hero_headline: Cosy Stone Cottage for Two in the Cotswolds Countryside

highlights.text: A peaceful one-bedroom retreat perfectly sized for two guests.
Nestled in the Cotswolds countryside near Stow-on-the-Wold.
Warm up beside a classic fireplace after a day of exploring.
Stay connected with broadband internet throughout your stay.

about_section: Briar Cottage is a cosy stone cottage for two, set in the Cotswolds countryside near Stow-on-the-Wold, United Kingdom. The one-bedroom, one-bathroom cottage offers a quiet and intimate escape. Check-in is from 4 PM and check-out by 10 AM.

amenity_descriptions.text: A fireplace provides a warm and inviting focal point for cosy evenings indoors.
Broadband internet keeps you connected throughout your stay.
